text:
Palestinians: Israeli forces killed at least 12 Palestinians in two separate locations, according to Palestinian officials. Four were members of the same family, including two young children, who were shot dead in the occupied West Bank. Israeli officials said their vehicle accelerated toward troops, who feared for their safety and opened fire. In Gaza, eight police officers affiliated with the enclave’s Hamas-controlled government, which is backed by Iran, were killed in an airstrike, the Gazan interior ministry said.
Americans killed: On Saturday, the Pentagon identified the six service members who died when a refueling aircraft that crashed in Iraq last Thursday, bringing the total number of American service members killed to at least 13.
Major developments — March 15
title: Iran War Live Updates: ‘No Guarantees’ Oil Prices Drop Soon, U.S. Official Says
